editorial_reasoning.calendar_tier: TIER 1 — NFL Draft Week (first round starts Thursday)
editorial_reasoning.dominant_topic: NBA Playoffs by tweet volume, but NFL Draft Week overrides per calendar tier

candidates_considered.story: Mendoza skipping draft to stay with sick mom
candidates_considered.hook: CONTINUING — #1 pick won't attend due to mother's MS
VJ Edgecombe (30 pts) and Maxey outgun Celtics without Embiid
Face-first fall, concussion protocol, Blazers steal one
27 and 23 in first two games, more PPG than Lakers legends
25 pts, 5 steals, 5 threes — franchise playoff record
ESPN story on potential NFL draft gambling scandal

stories.headline: Wemby's Face-First Fall Throws Spurs Season Into Chaos
stories.editorial_direction: The fall was terrifying. The concussion is confirmed. Game 3 Friday is in serious doubt. Show the injury (spin move, Holiday contact, unable to brace), the protocol timeline, and what it means for this series. Spurs went from 2-0 lead to 1-1 with their superstar sidelined.

tweets.text:
Might as well get this over with now. 

The Houston Rockets have been eliminated from the 2026 NBA Playoffs

Players drafted in 2023 with a 30-point playoff game:

— Scoot Henderson
— Victor Wembanyama

That's it.

The Lakers are missing

56.8 PPG
12.4 RPG
13.8 APG
2.7 SPG
6.3 3PM

and they're still up 2-0 on the Rockets.

key_stats: <cite index='21-8,22-4'>Wembanyama was fouled by Jrue Holiday after spinning around in the paint, fell face-first, hit jaw on court with 8:57 left in second quarter, played just 12 minutes total</cite>
<cite index='22-26'>Had 35 points in Game 1, a Spurs franchise playoff debut record</cite>
<cite index='27-15'>Spurs went 12-6 during regular season without Wembanyama</cite>
historical_context: <cite index='27-28'>Spurs blew 14-point fourth quarter lead in playoffs for first time since 2003, span of 76 games</cite>
<cite index='21-6,27-8'>Wembanyama led Spurs to league's second-best record behind versatile 7-foot-4 center</cite>
protocol_timeline: <cite index='22-8,22-9,22-10'>Cannot return to full participation for 48 hours after injury, can resume gradual activity after 24 hours if symptoms don't worsen, must hit benchmarks while symptom-free, requires team doctor and league protocol director clearance</cite>
<cite index='26-4,26-6,26-7'>Concussion typically keeps NBA player out 7-10 days, must be in recovery for 48 hours, then symptom free and cleared by team and league doctors</cite>
game_impact: <cite index='24-6'>Trail Blazers won 106-103 to even series at 1-1</cite>
<cite index='25-18,25-19'>Spurs had 14-point lead early fourth quarter, Portland came back with 11-2 run, San Antonio scoreless in final 3:37, Scoot Henderson led Blazers with 31 points</cite>
key_moments: <cite index='21-7,21-8'>Wembanyama spun around Jrue Holiday in paint, was fouled, unable to brace fall, jaw hit court</cite>
<cite index='21-9,23-9'>Remained on court 30 seconds, sat up for minute speaking to teammates, then jogged to locker room</cite>
where_it_goes: <cite index='23-14,26-10,26-11'>Game 3 Friday night in Portland, Game 4 Sunday in Portland</cite>
<cite index='27-13'>Coach wouldn't speculate on status: 'The protocol is the protocol'</cite>
<cite index='25-15,25-16'>Friday Game 3 earliest realistic target, but only if clears every protocol step, Spurs will not rush him back</cite>
defensive_context: <cite index='27-29,29-7,29-8'>Became unanimous NBA Defensive Player of Year winner Monday, first ever to receive 100% of first-place votes, youngest winner at 22 years 98 days, led league in blocks (3.1) for third straight season</cite>
series_implications: <cite index='25-5,25-6'>Injury revealed major weak point in San Antonio setup: lose defensive backbone and most straightforward game-changer when Wembanyama off court, don't have luxury of waiting for comeback</cite>

stories.headline: VJ Edgecombe Goes Nuclear in Boston, 76ers Steal Game 2
stories.editorial_direction: Rookie drops 30 points and 10 rebounds without Embiid. Maxey adds 29. They crush Boston from three after looking tight in Game 1. This is what the 76ers needed to prove they can compete without their MVP center.

tweets.text:
Marcus Smart in Game 2:

25 PTS
7 AST
5 STL
8-13 FG
5-7 3P

The first player in franchise history with 5+ steals and 5+ threes in a playoff game.

LUKE KENNARD IN THE PLAYOFFS:

Game 1: 27 PTS - 9/13 FG - 5/5 3P
Game 2: 23 PTS - 8/13 FG - 3/6 3P

No Austin Reaves 
No Luka 
NO PROBLEM

key_stats: <cite index='16-8,17-10'>VJ Edgecombe had 30 points and 10 rebounds, hit six 3-pointers, Tyrese Maxey added 29 points</cite>
<cite index='15-1,16-2'>Maxey and Edgecombe combined for 59 points, Philly crushed Boston from deep in 111-97 victory</cite>
game_context: <cite index='17-7,17-8,17-9'>76ers had worst shooting game of season in Game 1, looked tight from jump, vowed different approach for Game 2 and delivered</cite>
<cite index='19-15,19-16,19-17'>Game 1 was 123-91 Celtics win, 76ers missing Embiid (appendicitis), limited to 18 first quarter points, shot 17% from three (4-23)</cite>
rookie_impact: <cite index='16-23'>VJ Edgecombe writing his playoff story in rookie year</cite>
Edgecombe's 6 made threes tied for most by a rookie in playoff debut since 2019
where_it_goes: Series tied 1-1, shifts to Philadelphia for Games 3 and 4
76ers proved they can compete without Embiid — question is sustainability over 7 games
meme_angles: Smart having career night in what was supposed to be 76ers statement game

stories.headline: Luke Kennard Averaging More Playoff PPG Than Magic Johnson
stories.editorial_direction: 27 and 23 in his first two games as a Laker. The stat tweet writes itself — he's averaging more than Magic, Kareem, Wilt. Sometimes depth pieces just get hot at the right time.

tweets.text:
Luke Kennard averages more playoff PPG as a Laker than

— Anthony Davis 
— Kareem Abdul-Jabbar
— Magic Johnson
— Wilt Chamberlain
— James Worthy
— George Mikan
— Pau Gasol 
— Karl Malone

key_stats: <cite index='18-16'>Kennard had 23 points in Game 2, made up for missing Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves</cite>
<cite index='18-7'>Series felt like it changed when Durant blocked Kennard's shot attempt to start Game 2</cite>
context: Lakers up 2-0 on Rockets despite missing two key players
Kennard previously had modest playoff history before this breakout

stories.headline: Fernando Mendoza Won't Attend Draft to Care for Mom
stories.editorial_direction: CONTINUING STORY — yesterday covered his #1 pick status. Today's development: he's staying home because his mother has MS. Report the fact, mention the character aspect briefly, move on. Don't over-sentimentalize.

personal_situation: <cite index='3-7,4-2,4-9'>Mother Elsa has battled multiple sclerosis for over 15 years, currently uses wheelchair</cite>
<cite index='4-4,4-5'>Parents wanted to do draft at home, easier with family situation</cite>
draft_logistics: <cite index='1-2,2-14'>Still expected to be No. 1 overall pick by Las Vegas Raiders</cite>
<cite index='5-22,5-23'>NFL typically restricts guests to 10-12 people in green room, staying home allows larger gathering</cite>
character_element: <cite index='5-21'>Wanted to make memory with everybody who poured into football journey: mentors, coaches, family, friends</cite>

around_the_league.text: More about former Pittsburgh Steelers head coach Mike Tomlin joining NBC's Sunday night pregame show, "Football Night in America," as a studio analyst, via @bepryor:
Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel told reporters today that he has had "difficult conversations" regarding the recent photos that appeared of him.
Trail Blazers owner Tim Dundon requires players to shower at home after games as part of new hydro-saving plan.

A boost for Baltimore during draft week: Ravens DT Nnamdi Madubuike, who suffered a season-ending and career-threatening neck injury in Week 2 last season, underwent neck surgery last week that left his doctors believing he willl be able to resume playing this season, per sources.

T-Mac COOKING Alperen Sengun

"KD is getting double-teamed. You an All-Star. You're gonna have to do more"

Nia Long at the Michael movie premiere

Ime Udoka life hasn't been the same since he fumbled this woman.

Elly De La Cruz vs Rays:

3-6
2 HR
5 RBI
1 SB

The first shortstop with a multi-homer game this season.

Nikita Kucherov scores his first playoff goal since 2023.

He went 16 straight games without scoring.

Lebron when asked about his reverse dunk:

"I don't even know what that was about. I got to sit the hell down. I got to sit down somewhere" 😂😂

Alabama's QB Ty Simpson is one of the more intriguing prospects in the 2026 NFL Draft.

With an assist from @awscloud & @NextGenStats, @minakimes and I break down a potential landing spot and what pick range that may take place.

closer.hook: LeBron's confused about his own reverse dunk
